---
name: Feature request
about: Something missing or that could work better.
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem

What can you not do today, and why does it matter? Be concrete —
"I want to call Discord from a SOL flow because X" beats "Discord
support would be nice."

### Proposed solution

How would this look from the user's side? CLI flag, new capability,
config key, new endpoint?

### Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought through and rejected, with the reason.

### Additional context

Links to related issues, prior art in other tools, mock screenshots.
